requirements.title: Rust native live market-data smoke
requirements.description: Fetch real Binance futures symbols, klines, and ticker data through the Rust native market-data client on an explicitly selected testnet or production endpoint.

requirements.title: Rust native live account read smoke
requirements.description: Fetch real signed Binance futures position mode, multi-assets mode, USDT balance, and open-position snapshots through the Rust native signed REST client without placing or changing orders.
requirements.command: TRADING_BOT_RUST_LIVE_SMOKE=1 BINANCE_API_KEY=... BINANCE_API_SECRET=... BINANCE_TESTNET=true cargo run -p trading-bot-rust -- --native-live-smoke

requirements.title: Rust native stream recovery evidence
requirements.description: Show live or controlled-live Rust WebSocket disconnect, stale-cache, backoff, reconnect, and recovery behavior with redacted logs and passing recovery assertions.
requirements.command: cargo run -p trading-bot-rust -- --write-local-recovery-evidence plus controlled/live recovery evidence when available

requirements.title: Rust native order-guard recovery evidence
requirements.description: Show Rust order guard, audit, connector circuit breaker, dry-run, stop-loss close, and close-opposite recovery behavior without unsafe live order submission.
requirements.command: cargo run -p trading-bot-rust -- --write-local-recovery-evidence plus controlled/live order recovery evidence when available

requirements.title: Rust native release platform evidence
requirements.description: Attach release artifacts and platform smoke results for the Rust package before promoting standalone native runtime readiness.
